---
title: "Simple statistical tests with rstatix"
date: 2023-03-09
categories:
  - rstatix
  - R
# image: plot.png
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
                      fig.align = "center", fig.retina = 3,
                      out.width = "85%", collapse = TRUE)
```

```{r, load-libraries-data, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(rstatix)
library(here)
```


```{r}


```
